name: Endpoint Patch Compliance Check
description: Scans managed endpoints for missing security patches and enforces patch compliance. When a compliance scan alert fires, the playbook queries the endpoint for missing patches, assesses the risk of unpatched vulnerabilities, and routes based on criticality. Critical missing patches trigger an immediate remediation ticket with high priority and SOC notification. Non-critical gaps are logged for the next maintenance window.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Query endpoint for installed patches and missing updates

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for missing critical patches

config.description: Triggers when a patch compliance scan identifies missing security patches on an endpoint

config.code:
missing = alert.get('missing_patches', [])
critical_patches = [p for p in missing if p.get('severity') in ['critical', 'high']]
non_critical = [p for p in missing if p.get('severity') not in ['critical', 'high']]
result = {'total_missing': len(missing), 'critical_count': len(critical_patches), 'critical_patches': critical_patches, 'non_critical_count': len(non_critical), 'has_critical': len(critical_patches) > 0}
config.description: Parse the list of missing patches and categorize by severity
Routes based on whether any critical or high-severity patches are missing

parameters.title: URGENT: {{code_1.critical_count}} Critical Patches Missing — {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}

config.description: Create a high-priority remediation ticket for the missing critical patches
Alert the SOC team about the critical patch compliance failure

parameters.note: Endpoint {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}} has {{code_1.non_critical_count}} non-critical missing patches. Scheduled for next maintenance window.

config.description: Log the non-critical missing patches for the next scheduled maintenance window
